name: Sarah M.
text: An absolute gem hidden in the tea plantations. The food was exceptional — Italian flavours with a Malawian twist. Flavia is a wonderful host.

name: James K.
text: The most peaceful place I've stayed in Malawi. Waking up to birdsong and tea garden views was magical. The garden-to-table dinner was a highlight of our trip.

name: Marta L.
text: We came for lunch and stayed for the art workshop. What a unique experience. The house has so much character and history.

name: David & Ruth P.
text: A wonderful weekend escape from Blantyre. The cottage by the pool was perfect. Great food, lovely gardens, and Flavia's art studio was a real bonus.
